chapter: Chapter: A Tale of Valour – Major Somnath Sharma and the Battle of Badgam

questions.question: Who was Major Somnath Sharma?
questions.answer: A brave officer of the Indian Army.

questions.question: Which regiment did Major Somnath Sharma belong to?
Where did the Battle of Badgam take place?
In which year did the battle occur?
What important place was under threat during the battle?
What injury did Major Somnath Sharma have?
questions.answer: His arm was in a plaster cast.

questions.question: Did Major Somnath Sharma avoid the battle due to his injury?
questions.answer: No, he insisted on leading his soldiers.

questions.question: What was the duty of Sharma’s company at Badgam?
questions.answer: To patrol and observe enemy movements.

questions.question: What difficulty did the soldiers face in the battle?
questions.answer: They were outnumbered by enemy forces.

questions.question: What did Major Somnath Sharma encourage his soldiers to do?
What message did Major Somnath Sharma send during the battle?
questions.answer: They would fight to the last man and last round.

questions.question: What helped delay the enemy advance?
Which city was protected because of the battle?
What happened to Major Somnath Sharma during the battle?
questions.answer: He was killed in a mortar explosion.

questions.question: Which award was given to Major Somnath Sharma?
What kind of award is the Param Vir Chakra?
What does the word 'valour' mean?
What quality made Major Somnath Sharma a hero?
What role do soldiers play in a country?
Why are soldiers respected in society?
questions.answer: Because they sacrifice their lives for the nation.

questions.question: What helped strengthen Srinagar’s defence?
What value does the story emphasize?
Why is Major Somnath Sharma remembered today?
What does the title 'A Tale of Valour' suggest?
What is the moral of the chapter?
questions.answer: Courage and sacrifice protect the nation.
